programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: When wild weather and traffic convoys cause carnage, Thord races against time to rescue stranded drivers. In the North, Ole Henrik takes the companys brand new tow-truck on its first mission. The task is to rescue a truck that crashed deep into a snow covered ditch, then flipped 90 degrees onto its side. Ole Henriks eager to put the new flagship rescue truck to the test, to see if its worth the big investment.

programme.title: Ice Road Rescue
programme.desc: "Ice Road Rescue" portrays a group of heroic tow truck rescue workers. When winter hits Norway the transport roads turn into treacherous bobsleigh tracks. Every day the rescuers fight to keep this routes open by rescuing heavy trailers stuck in the mountain terrain. Winter storms, avalanches and lack of daylight through the winter season are just some of the challenges they have to face, working close to the polar circle. Extreme winter conditions that often make them risk their lives. "Ice Road Rescue" shows the ultimate man versus nature.

programme.title: The Devils Climb
programme.desc: Alex Honnold and Tommy Caldwell are two of the greatest rock climbers of all time - and best friends. Together, they set off on an epic adventure cycling 2,500 miles enroute to a daring climb of The Devils Thumb, a legendary 9,000-foot Alaskan peak surrounded by old-growth rainforest. Tommy is recovering from a career-threatening injury making the expeditions success uncertain.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: Port Protection is home to the few who have left behind normal society and chosen a different life in a remote Alaskan community, where survival of the individuals and community cannot sustain without the other. The stakes are high. The land is rugged and unforgiving and the seas which surround Port Protection are cold and merciless. With risk comes a reward more profound than mere survival: a world of beauty and freedom with the security of community and without the constraints of bureaucracy. In Port Protection there are no clear roads to survival, inhabitants must carve one themselves.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: Port Protection is home to the few who have left behind normal society and chosen a different life in a remote Alaskan community, where survival of the individuals and community cannot sustain without the other. The stakes are high. The land is rugged and unforgiving and the seas which surround Port Protection are cold and merciless. With risk comes a reward more profound than mere survival: a world of beauty and freedom with the security of community and without the constraints of bureaucracy. In Port Protection there are no clear roads to survival, inhabitants must carve one themselves.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: In Californias Mojave Desert, Virgin Galactic test pilots are at the controls of a revolutionary aircraft designed for sub-orbital flight. But as the spaceship accelerates toward the outer reaches of Earths atmosphere, approaching the speed of sound, it breaks apart and falls from the sky. With the future of commercial space travel hanging in the balance, its up to investigators to figure out what went wrong.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Korean Air Flight 6316 is en route to Seoul with a load of non-hazardous cargo. But shortly after takeoff, the pilots struggle to navigate the skies above Shanghai. The controller notices the plane isnt climbing to its assigned altitude. And within minutes, the MD-11F disappears from radar altogether and slams into a residential neighborhood. The massive impact registers the equivalent of a 1.6-magnitude earthquake, destroys the flight data recorder, and claims the lives of five civilians and the three-man crew. Investigators from China, South Korea, and the US join forces, and are soon able to rule out both mechanical issues and sabotage. Its only when they reconstruct the flight in a simulator that the mystery begins to unravel—and they come to a startling realization.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Twenty minutes after taking off from Taipei, Taiwan a China Airlines 747 suddenly disappears from radar. A massive rescue mission is launched, ut all 225 passengers and crew are dead. After ruling out both a bomb and a gas tank explosion, investigators are stumped. They examine hundreds of pieces of wreckage until they discover a single piece of the hull that solves the riddle. Tragically, the crash of Flight 611 began with a problem that began twenty-two years earlier.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Science of Stupid
programme.desc: Science of Stupid, series 8. Dallas Campbell hosts the show that combines serious science with some of the craziest, most spectacular user generated clips ever recorded. In each programme we show 40 to 50 clips of misadventure: ordinary folk making extraordinary mistakes and paying the price. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: First created in 1795, meet the great grandson of legendary bourbon-maker Jim Beam at the Kentucky factory where a single batch of White Label starts with a million gallons of crushed grain and water. Nicknamed the friendly city, Athens, Tennessee is also home to the celebrated dairy farm where TruMoo chocolate milk is blended by the truckload. The countrys number-one top seller, over a million Tinas Burritos roll of a California assembly line every day, and every single one is rolled by hand.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Producing a savory meal thats ready in three minutes, Nongshim is South Koreas top selling brand, and its giant California facility alone produces over 200 million ramen noodle bowls per year. It takes an "octopus", a "guillotine", and a chocolate waterfall to produce Look candy bars--the classic American treat that combines chewy peanut-filled nougat with a delectable dark chocolate coating. Though the company admits its name is half-baked, Semifreddis bakery produces fluffy and flawless Challah--the hand-braided egg bread thats kosher, doughy, and delicious.

programme.title: Megacities
programme.desc: Its the worlds biggest city. It sprawls across more than 1,400 square kilometers. But for the 18 million people who live here, its not just another metropolis. Mexico City is ground zero. This Mega-city violates the first rule of real estate: location. On one side: one of the worlds most earthquake-prone hotspots. On the other: one of the worlds most active volcanoes. And beneath their feet - a shaky foundation of landfill. To Mother Nature, Mexico City is one big target. And any moment, the Big One could hit. But against the most destructive force of nature, the city is tapping the power of science. From subways to freeways, Mexico City is harnessing cutting-edge technology to build in safety. Towering over the city is Latin Americas tallest skyscraper - built to ride out an earthquake on giant shock absorbers. Most of all, the city is now armed with a slender line of defense: an earthquake detection system, built to give the city a one-minute warning before a quake arrives. Because today, the question isnt if another earthquake will hit - but when.

programme.title: Megacities
programme.desc: Megacities revolves around worlds most iconic and most unique cities, looking at them as at a living creature that lives, breathes and develops. The series examines the infrastructure of stunning locations of our planet, which are Las Vegas, Mexico City, Hong Kong, Taipei, London, Paris, Sao Paulo, Kaohsiung, Jakarta, Mumbai and New York. Every episode uncovers the rapid growth, formal and informal economics as well as poverty, crime, and levels of social fragmentation.

programme.title: Worlds Toughest Fixes
programme.desc: Batten down the hatches and strap yourself in…Worlds Toughest Fixes is taking on a job that brings power to the people - assembling a giant wind turbine. Getting this monster machine off the ground means lifting three massive parts to the top of a 220 foot tower --- one weighing as much as an Abrams Tank - another whose combined length is as long as a football field. Prepare to be blown away by high winds, heavy loads and high wire rigging as the crew wrestles nature to deliver the dream of energy independence to the community of Portsmouth, Rhode Island.

programme.title: Worlds Toughest Fixes
programme.desc: Riley heads to a divers paradise in Curacao, but this underwater adventure is no vacation. He and a team of top-notch industrial divers are in for some serious heavy lifting - rigging and removing a 50-ton rudder from a massive iron ore carrier bound for China. Rileys a master rigger on land, but on this job hes a fish out of water. Running against the clock, with millions at stake, this is one the biggest underwater repair jobs ever attempted -- for Riley, its perhaps his toughest fix yet.

programme.title: Worlds Toughest Fixes
programme.desc: Grab your sunglasses… This week on Worlds Toughest Fixes were going to harness the sun to drive the only operating solar reflective power tower in the United States. This show is definitely not for the superstitious as Riley joins a crew lifting two 65 ton boilers 160 feet up to two towers and suspending them above 24,000 mirrors… One slip up and its going to be way more than seven years bad luck.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: Europe from Above
programme.desc: This series of spectacular aerial journeys reveal Europes most remarkable nations as theyve never been seen before. From erupting volcanoes in Iceland, to pristine Roman amphitheaters in Croatia and riding record breaking waves in Portugal. This all access aerial documentary lays bare the traditions, innovations and engineering breakthroughs that continue to shape these great modern nations today.

programme.title: Europe from Above
programme.desc: Europe from Above takes to the air over Germany, Italy, the Netherlands, Poland, Spain and the UK to showcase Europes finest cultural and geographical landmarks as youve never seen them before. Stunning aerial hyper-lapse photography allows us to visualise the changes of a season in seconds, as tulip fields in the Netherlands magically burst into colour and waterfalls in the Dolomites turn to ice. We reveal how tradition, engineering and natural wonders have shaped this epic continent - a vibrant portrait of these regions and the people who keep their traditions alive.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: The Bibles famous Tower of Babel, so tall it reached the heavens, exceeded all modern engineering wonders. We follow a season of excavations to discover if such a tower ever existed. Teams dig deep to reveal magnificent ancient monuments across Iraq and take to the skies to search Babylon for answers. New discoveries and immersive CGI shed light on the world in which this Bible story was written.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: In Israel, archaeologists investigate the truth behind one of the greatest discoveries in history: the Dead Sea Scrolls. Found in 1947 deep in the Judean desert, this remarkable haul of 2,000-year-old manuscripts includes the oldest copies of the biblical texts ever found. But no one knows who wrote them or why they were hidden. In this episode, investigators combine traditional excavations with revolutionary analytical technologies to uncover new evidence that could help solve these mysteries. Cutting-edge imaging techniques reveal hidden clues in the scrolls — which could help identify the authors — while archaeological discoveries in Jerusalem paint a picture of a brutal, destructive event that would tear apart the ancient Jewish world around the time the scrolls were hidden.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of historys most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Pirates: Behind the Legends
programme.desc: Sir Francis Drake, a hero to the English, known as The Dragon to the Spanish. From his journeys as a slave trader to his vicious attacks on Spanish colonial towns, Drakes status continues to rise with the endless stolen plunder he brings to Queen Elizabeth 1st. The circumnavigation is the pinnacle of his career, cementing him in history as the worlds most controversial pirate.

programme.title: Pirates: Behind the Legends
programme.desc: Grace OMalley, the Pirate Queen of Ireland. Born to a seafaring family, OMalley defied gender conventions to become the most feared and respected leader of both the land and the sea. Using marriage to wrangle her political position and securing lands through a meeting with Queen Elizabeth, OMalleys rise from wanted pirate to Chieftain is won through a warriors sword and a womans grit.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: The story of Exodus is one of the great biblical tales, but why does ancient Egypt play such a central role? We follow a new season of excavations to find answers. Teams brush away layers of earth to reveal a magnificent lost palace and decipher reliefs from the temple of one of Egypts greatest pharaohs. New discoveries shed light on the period in which this biblical story was set.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: The Bibles famous Tower of Babel, so tall it reached the heavens, exceeded all modern engineering wonders. We follow a season of excavations to discover if such a tower ever existed. Teams dig deep to reveal magnificent ancient monuments across Iraq and take to the skies to search Babylon for answers. New discoveries and immersive CGI shed light on the world in which this Bible story was written.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: In Israel, archaeologists investigate the truth behind one of the greatest discoveries in history: the Dead Sea Scrolls. Found in 1947 deep in the Judean desert, this remarkable haul of 2,000-year-old manuscripts includes the oldest copies of the biblical texts ever found. But no one knows who wrote them or why they were hidden. In this episode, investigators combine traditional excavations with revolutionary analytical technologies to uncover new evidence that could help solve these mysteries. Cutting-edge imaging techniques reveal hidden clues in the scrolls — which could help identify the authors — while archaeological discoveries in Jerusalem paint a picture of a brutal, destructive event that would tear apart the ancient Jewish world around the time the scrolls were hidden.

programme.title: Lost Treasures of the Bible
programme.desc: Exodus and the conquest of the land of Canaan are among the Bibles most famous stories. They tell how the Israelites triumphed, with the help of the Ark of the Covenant. The problem is that there is little archaeological evidence that these tales happened exactly as the Bible describes. Across the Holy Land, archaeologists and investigators dig through the ruins of ancient cities to uncover the real world behind the biblical accounts. Just west of Jerusalem, one team explores a cave tomb to reveal evidence for the origins of the Israelites enemies, the Philistines. In northern Israel, another team excavates the remains of the Canaanite kingdoms mightiest stronghold and finds mysterious Egyptian artifacts that shed new light on the traditional tale of the Israelites journey to what the Bible calls the Promised Land.

programme.title: Bloody Tales of Europe
programme.desc: Gravediggers, witches and goat riders are the focus of BLOODY TALES - DARK ARTS where Tudor historian Dr Suzannah Lipscomb and journalist Joe Crowley venture into the unknown. Were the gravediggers of a town called Frankenstein guilty of spreading the plague with powders made from dead corpses? Why was a respectable surgeon accused of being a gang leader of devil worshipping thieves, and how did a small Basque village get caught up in the biggest witch hunt in Spanish history?

programme.title: Bloody Tales of Europe
programme.desc: From one of Romes most feared Emperors to Hungarys Countess Dracula, BLOODY TALES reveals some of historys most infamous characters and events. In MONSTERS, Tudor historian Dr Suzannah Lipscomb and journalist Joe Crowley team up to investigate three extraordinary stories. Why did young Emperor Caligula with the Roman Empire at his feet rule through fear and madness? How did a decorated French war hero turn into a prolific child killer? And why did an aging Hungarian widow become known as Countess Dracula?

programme.title: Pirates: Behind the Legends
programme.desc: Sir Francis Drake, a hero to the English, known as The Dragon to the Spanish. We analyse the science behind the mishaps, with the help of bespoke animation and super slow-motion cinematography.

programme.title: Food Factory USA
programme.desc: Jamba Juices Red Fusion smoothie is so cool that its freshly harvested raspberries are individually quick frozen in liquid nitrogen. Founded by a self-proclaimed mad scientist in the late 1950s, 400,000 frozen BakenServ AnyTime! cinnamon rolls are made daily at this giant Wisconsin facility. After making giant batches of Ben and Jerrys New York Super Fudge Chunk ice cream, employees at the companys Vermont factory get to take home three free pints a day.

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.desc: Extreme weather patterns have threatened ships and mariners for centuries. The perfect storm?. towering walls of water, powerful winds and churning seas can overwhelm any ship. What brought down the largest haul of Spanish treasure off the coast of Florida? And whats the truth behind the strange disappearance of the mightiest invasion force of ancient times? Drain the Oceans reveals the secrets of Stormy Seas.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz have taken on a 1972 Peugeot 504 cabriolet - a rare French grand tourer that is considered by many to be the most beautifully designed car that Peugeot ever produced. The car belongs to former NHS dentist Barry who bought it back in the 1980s . He had planned to restore his much loved motor back to its former glory but when family issues and ill health got in the way his Peugeot dream came to an end. His family put in a call to Car SOS hoping that Tim and Fuzz could help say a big thank you to this pillar of the local community.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz are off to Forfar in Scotland to rescue the rusting wreck of a rare Talbot Sunbeam Lotus. The car was the pride and joy of former firefighter, and lifelong rally enthusiast, Jim who had planned to restore it, however a back injury not only forced him to give up his job but also any plans to get his car back on the road. Once the boys get the car back in the workshop they discover they have something very special on their hands as the Talbot turns out to be an ultra-rare factory proto type.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz are off to Kent to try and salvage a 1991 VW T4 Campervan. The vehicle belongs to 42 year old carpenter Jon who bought his mobile home several year ago with the dream of taking his wife travelling around the world. Sadly before Jons dream came true he was diagnosed with brain cancer, his whole world ground to a halt and his plans to restore and drive his beloved van had to go on hold. Will the Car SOS team be able to help resurrect Jons dream?

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz head to Kent to rescue a much-loved 1973 Dennis Fire Engine. Previously belonging to New Romney station, firefighter Tony cherished it as his own and years later purchased it to restore and use to raise money for charity. Sadly, Tony passed away from cancer and never completed the restoration. Colleagues have nominated his son James for the Car SOS treatment to see his dads wishes come true.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz head to Manchester to rescue a rusting Citroen HY van that was originally purchased so 19 year-old Darcie and her mum Alison could start up their own mobile catering business. Sadly, the dream was shattered when Alison was killed in the Manchester Arena suicide bombing in 2017. Will the boys be able to work their magic and get the Citroen back on the road? Former England footballers Bryan Robson and Wes Brown join in to help restore the fortunes of a family torn apart by tragic events.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler

programme.title: Construction Fails
programme.desc: An overpass on Philadelphias busy Interstate- 95 highway sets ablaze after a tanker truck rollover. Fails include the worlds most powerful radio telescope collapse, a swanky New York City skyscraper with a tall list of problems, a sinking airport in Japan, a whole lot of collapses in Nigeria, plus a museum renovation with a vision thats not quite crystal clear.

programme.title: Disaster Autopsy
programme.desc: A construction crane in the heart of New York City, Italys iconic Morandi Bridge, and a multistory department store in Korea — three major disasters linked to engineering errors. Now, using the latest research and evidence along with 3D reconstructions, experts rewind the day of each disaster, dissect the chain of events, and pinpoint the warnings and design flaws that spiraled into structural collapse. How does a series of oversights, design flaws, and negligent decisions lead to deadly catastrophes?

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of historys most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Pirates: Behind the Legends
programme.desc: The Englishman turned Algerian pirate. From humble beginnings as an impoverished sailor, John Ward grows tired of the drudgery of the English navy. At the age of 50 he starts his remarkable ascent from petty pirate to a notorious menace in the Mediterranean sea, converting to Islam and becoming a protected ruler of the Tunisian empire.

programme.title: Pirates: Behind the Legends
programme.desc: The career of Henry Morgan goes beyond the beloved rum he is synonymous with. A brilliant strategist, Morgan takes humans, treasure and Spanish colonial towns with no mercy. Sailing very close to the edge of legalities, Morgans time as a pirate is punished with a brief stint in the Tower of London followed by a promotion to become Lieutenant Governor of Jamaica.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Air and Marine Operations in St. Thomas arrest a suspected smuggler and chase a vessel fleeing into British Virgin Island waters. U.S. Customs and Border Protection busts a mother-daughter duo smuggling large amounts of marijuana through Miami International Airport to the Caribbean. In El Paso, alerts from the K9 at the Sierra Blanca checkpoint lead U.S. Border Patrol agents to the discovery of drugs and guns in multiple vehicles.

programme.title: To Catch a Smuggler
programme.desc: Even during a pandemic, smuggling never stops. After adjusting tactics in the early days of the COVID crisis to meet the increasing flow of narcotics coming across our southern land borders, the Department of Homeland Security is now pivoting back to our nations airports where international travel is starting to rev back up again. Whether narco-traffickers try to slip through an airport, seaport or land crossing, vigilant officers are on high-alert to stem the flow of illegal contraband. Using every tool available to them, DHS will stop at nothing to catch a smuggler.

programme.title: Airport Security: Colombia
programme.desc: Antinarcotics police officers at El Dorado International Airport must complete their mission to disrupt the activity of drug traffickers. First, they will detect an ingeniously hidden cocaine shipment with the help of specially trained dogs. Later, thanks to their X-ray equipment, they thwart the attempt of a man to smuggle cocaine capsules inside his stomach while they also rush to save his life. Immigrations officers live moments of dramatic tension when a mother tries to take her daughter out of the country with forged documents. Later, they must stop a passenger from evading justice by leaving the country. Meanwhile, the officers working at the post office will intercept a shipment of cocaine hidden inside an apparently innocent childrens movie, and they will discover that a cargo of thirty handcrafted ceramic statuettes of Latin American political leaders might not be what it appears to be. In one of the security check-points, the infrared control system for luggage manages to catch an unexpected stash of ten kilograms of liquid cocaine, stored inside deodorant canisters. Later, the officers must sharpen their senses when the shoes of two passengers, pretending to be buddies on a holiday trip, might yield evidence that could land the two men in jail.

programme.title: Airport Security: Peru
programme.desc: Security teams at Perus biggest airport work 24-7 to stop illegal activity. The biggest problem: cocaine smuggling. Police stop a woman travelling with her 5-year-old. If shes a carrier, agents must figure out what to do with the child. A Mexican citizen is found with a large amount of beer and soft drinks. All these goods may contain cocaine. Officers uncover a creative new method of hiding cocaine in food packaging.

programme.title: Airport Security: To Catch a Smuggler Latin America Compilation
programme.desc: These carriers are frequent flyers. From Airport Security Colombia and Peru, a Spaniard with cocaine pretends to be shocked. A man going to the DR with cocaine tells officers he has been there before. A man on his second trip claims he was forced. A woman uses someone elses authentic passport to travel. An Indonesian woman carries cocaine and multiple types of currency. A freelance trafficker boasts he has information on a 1000 kilo load.

programme.title: Airport Security: To Catch a Smuggler Latin America Compilation
programme.desc: The oldest and youngest carriers from Airport Security Colombia and Peru. A woman with cocaine and a record. 19-year-old student carries to help his sick mother. A 19-year-old woman claims her aunt tricked her. An old man cannot believe he is carrying, and neither can the relative he calls. An old man from the Marshall Islands may be part of a trend to enlist the elderly as carriers. A young Venezuelan man risks it all due to conditions at home.

programme.title: Pirates: Behind the Legends
programme.desc: The Englishman turned Algerian pirate. From humble beginnings as an impoverished sailor, John Ward grows tired of the drudgery of the English navy. At the age of 50 he starts his remarkable ascent from petty pirate to a notorious menace in the Mediterranean sea, converting to Islam and becoming a protected ruler of the Tunisian empire.

Sailing very close to the edge of legalities, Morgans time as a pirate is punished with a brief stint in the Tower of London followed by a promotion to become Lieutenant Governor of Jamaica.

programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz are off to Forfar in Scotland to rescue the rusting wreck of a rare Talbot Sunbeam Lotus. The car was the pride and joy of former firefighter, and lifelong rally enthusiast, Jim who had planned to restore it, however a back injury not only forced him to give up his job but also any plans to get his car back on the road. Once the boys get the car back in the workshop they discover they have something very special on their hands as the Talbot turns out to be an ultra-rare factory proto type.

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Tim and Fuzz are off to Kent to try and salvage a 1991 VW T4 Campervan. The vehicle belongs to 42 year old carpenter Jon who bought his mobile home several year ago with the dream of taking his wife travelling around the world. Sadly before Jons dream came true he was diagnosed with brain cancer, his whole world ground to a halt and his plans to restore and drive his beloved van had to go on hold. Will the Car SOS team be able to help resurrect Jons dream?

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: Port Protection is home to the few who have left behind normal society and chosen a different life in a remote Alaskan community, where survival of the individuals and community cannot sustain without the other. The stakes are high. The land is rugged and unforgiving and the seas which surround Port Protection are cold and merciless. With risk comes a reward more profound than mere survival: a world of beauty and freedom with the security of community and without the constraints of bureaucracy. In Port Protection there are no clear roads to survival, inhabitants must carve one themselves.

programme.title: Lawless Island
programme.desc: Port Protection is home to the few who have left behind normal society and chosen a different life in a remote Alaskan community, where survival of the individuals and community cannot sustain without the other. The stakes are high. The land is rugged and unforgiving and the seas which surround Port Protection are cold and merciless. With risk comes a reward more profound than mere survival: a world of beauty and freedom with the security of community and without the constraints of bureaucracy. In Port Protection there are no clear roads to survival, inhabitants must carve one themselves.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Harrowing stories of tragedy and triumph are brought to life through official reports, transcripts and interviews with the pilots, air traffic controllers and lucky survivors of historys most terrifying crashes. Widely considered to be the safest form of travel, air transportation is still in its infancy and when midair calamity strikes, the results are often catastrophic. From the cockpit to the cabin, from the control room to the crash scene, we uncover just what went wrong.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Every time a plane crashes, the world takes notice. And so do the experts whose job it is to figure out what happened. Air Crash Investigation uncovers the truth behind the most legendary aviation disasters, and every episode features eyewitness accounts, captivating reenactments, state-of-the-art CGI, and interviews with the investigators who ultimately determined what went wrong. This season on Air Crash Investigation: Conflicting stories emerge after a Swedish cargo plane spirals to the ground; an African airliner crashes in the wilderness and the cause proves too sinister to be believed; and, when a Pakistani passenger jet disappears on approach to Kathmandu, Nepalese investigators must determine how it ended up on a crash course with the Himalayas.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: Air France Flight #296 (Airbus A320) June 26th, 1988 The Airbus A-320 the worlds most sophisticated passenger jet takes off for its maiden passenger flight and first-ever public demonstration. The plane is headed for the Habsheim Air Show where the pilots are planning a breathtaking, low-altitude fly-over. But after getting into position over the tiny airfield the exhibition turns to disaster. The plane plows into a forest and is consumed by flames. It is a horrible tragedy, and a public relations nightmare for Airbus. With such a huge investment on the line, there is enormous pressure on investigators to determine whether the pilot or the plane was at fault.

programme.title: Deadly Instincts
programme.desc: The law of the wild is kill, or be killed - but how do different creatures execute this most grisly of tasks? From solo slayers like tigers, who rely on stealth, speed and strength, to team players like orca, who use their intelligence to work together and kill against the odds, this is a new and unique exploration of how animals kill.

programme.title: Deadly Instincts
programme.desc: Beyond the 50/50 coin toss of fight or flight, survival really is a numbers game. Your threats stack up: primed predators, child killers, cruel nature. Whether through courage, wisdom, strength, or by leveraging super-powers, the survivors make it - against all odds.

programme.title: Deadly Instincts
programme.desc: In the animal world, mating is big business. Its key to passing on genes, and ultimately species survival. These are the stories of dedication, intimacy and ruthlessness that make up the game of love. The stakes are high, and winning is everything.

programme.title: Deadly Instincts
programme.desc: For any animal, growing up is tough. Young life is riddled with seminal moments and momentous mistakes. A baby elephant gets kicked around by males from her family, and discovered the perils associated with keeping up with the herd when your mum is inexperienced.

programme.title: Deadly Instincts
programme.desc: Beyond the 50/50 coin toss of fight or flight, survival really is a numbers game. Your threats stack up: primed predators, child killers, cruel nature. Whether through courage, wisdom, strength, or by leveraging super-powers, the survivors make it - against all odds.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Compilations
programme.desc: House Calls. Dr. Ferguson travels to a local zoo to examine some groundhogs. A mini horse has a mysterious knot on its shoulder. A newborn calf and its mother, suffering a swollen udder, drive the docs to become foster moms for the calf.

programme.title: Deadly Instincts
programme.desc: In the animal world, mating is big business. Its key to passing on genes, and ultimately species survival. These are the stories of dedication, intimacy and ruthlessness that make up the game of love. The stakes are high, and winning is everything.

programme.title: Deadly Instincts
programme.desc: For any animal, growing up is tough. Young life is riddled with seminal moments and momentous mistakes. A baby elephant gets kicked around by males from her family, and discovered the perils associated with keeping up with the herd when your mum is inexperienced.

programme.title: Savage Kingdom
programme.desc: Brand new series. Savute, Botswana: 2000 square miles of remote African savannah. This ancient land is governed by competing clans of ruthlessly proficient predators - leopards, lions, hyenas and wild dogs. Their survival depends on the giant herds of powerful prey - buffalo, elephant and zebra - who have roamed Savute in search of sustenance, season after season, millennium after millennium. Each day is a life-or-death struggle - animal against animal, animal against nature. There is no mercy, and there is but one rule: survive. In this episode, a small family of wild dogs goes on the run, desperately looking for a safe place to raise six tiny puppies. But the Savage Kingdom will test them to the limit. Narrated by Charles Dance.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: This family farm needs a barn! The Pols are ready to tackle their next big project: preserving and carefully taking down a 100-year-old barn since, with every piece they remove makes the barn weaker and weaker. There is no room for error if they are going to transport these irreplaceable beams back to the farm and restore it to its former glory.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The Pols have reached the most dangerous stage of disassembling the 100-year-old barn: taking down the beams. Then, if all goes well, theyll transport the beams back to the farm. Each part of this process must be carefully orchestrated to protect these irreplaceable beams. Meanwhile, Beth tries training Clovis after he runs away from the farm.

programme.title: Savage Kingdom
programme.desc: Savute is a land where natural law is taken to its limit and sometimes... beyond. Across six episodes we see the full impact that the cycle of Savutes seasons has on every carnivore clan. The rains leave a time of birth and plenty in their wake, but all too soon the soil is parched and the grass gone. Rival tribes of predators are squeezed into a cauldron of competition. This season in Savute, who will survive?

programme.title: Africas Hidden Wonders
programme.desc: A land full of extreme environments and teeming with iconic wildlife, Africa holds a fascination like no other continent. This series takes the viewer on a journey from harsh desert landscapes to towering peaks, and from vast, sprawling grasslands to raging river torrents. The three episodes cover the mist-covered jungles and mountains of Rwanda and the great apes who call it home; the largest desert in the world, the Sahara, where the scarcity of water and food make life a daily challenge for the creatures who compete for them; and the cradle of humanity, Ethiopia, a weather-ravaged land full of natural beauty and unique wildlife.

programme.title: Savage Kingdom
programme.desc: She haunts the trees and hills in the heart of the realm. She is solitary, silent and virtually invisible. Saba the leopard is a killer without rival. Saba is the most spectacular and resourceful hunter the Savage Kingdom has seen. Her stronghold, Leopard Rock, sits at the heart of this brutal realm it is a place where she can vanish into the shadows and avoid running into her rivals lions, hyenas and wild dogs. There is no question that Saba the leopard can take care of herself, but her strength and resilience will be cruelly tested when she tries to bring two cubs into the realm where only she can protect and feed them in the midst of the cauldron of warring predators. The ordeal will tear at her heart.

programme.title: Savage Kingdom
programme.desc: Brand new series. Savute, Botswana: 2000 square miles of remote African savannah. This ancient land is governed by competing clans of ruthlessly proficient predators - leopards, lions, hyenas and wild dogs. programme.title: Savage Kingdom
programme.desc: Savute, Botswana: 2000 square miles of remote African savannah. This ancient land is governed by competing clans of ruthlessly proficient predators - leopards, lions, hyenas and wild dogs. Their survival depends on the giant herds of powerful prey - buffalo, elephant and zebra - who have roamed Savute in search of sustenance, season after season, millennium after millennium. Each day is a life-or-death struggle - animal against animal, animal against nature. There is no mercy, and there is but one rule: survive. Not all lions in the Savage Kingdom are born equal. While the marsh pride dominates the beating heart of the realm, the three lionesses of the northern pride struggle to hold their ground in the forests and hills. Once a great pride, their sons have been banished, and if they cant rebuild their pride they face hunger, exile or worse. Narrated by Charles Dance.

programme.title: Savage Kingdom
programme.desc: Brand new series: Savute, Botswana: 2000 square miles of remote African savannah. This ancient land is governed by competing clans of ruthlessly proficient predators - leopards, lions, hyenas and wild dogs. Their survival depends on the giant herds of powerful prey - buffalo, elephant and zebra - who have roamed Savute in search of sustenance, season after season, millennium after millennium. Each day is a life or death struggle - animal against animal, animal against nature. The old lion Queen is dead and now Matsumi, the greatest hunter, takes the throne. Leading the most brutal army in the realm, she faces many challenges in holding this volatile gang together and appeasing her King. Narrated by Charles Dance.

programme.title: Savage Kingdom
programme.desc: Savute is a land where natural law is taken to its limit and sometimes... beyond. programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Compilations
programme.desc: The Docs at Critter Fixer lean on their vet techs as they try to save a beloved chicken. The team meets an amazing, rare dog breed and come up with a solution for a messy feline fiasco. The docs also take on a menagerie of patients, including a bearded dragon, a pig-nosed turtle, and help a local farmer introduce wild bass to their brand-new home.

programme.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Compilations
programme.desc: The Docs at Critter Fixer help a first-time dog owner with puppies and aid an achy peacock. Dr. Hodges attempts to remove gigantic bladder stones from a tiny dog, help a guinea pig with labored breathing, treat the snouts of some hognose snakes, and fix an adolescent groundhog at a rescue. The docs fly in to perform a rare amputation on an owl.

programme.title: Wild Winter
programme.desc: This series examines the incredible adaptations, predatory behaviours, survival instincts, and breeding habits of the unique animals that call some of the iciest locations on Earth their home.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The Pols new livestock arent potty trained; their sheep hut isnt draining properly and has now been transformed into a Pee Palace. Its late fall and the winter deep freeze is just around the corner, so the family needs to get it fixed fast. The Pols also get a new sheep for their farm.

programme.title: The Incredible Pol Farm
programme.desc: The Pol clan gets to work on creating Beths dream garden. To beat the incoming rainstorm, an exhausted Ben works around the clock to finish building the gardens pond and waterfall. Noticing her brother is near his breaking point, Beth plans a special surprise to lift his spirits.

programme.title: Polar Worlds with Bertie Gregory Mashup
programme.desc: National Geographic filmmaker Bertie Gregory travels to the gateways to the poles to film wildlife in two of the harshest environments on the planet: South Georgia Island above Antarctica, and Canadas frigid North below the Arctic Circle. Surviving in these vastly different environments require cunning, persistence and the ability to adapt to a changing climate. This is the story of Berties quest to capture these wild environments firsthand.

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: South America is a land of extremes. Many hundred thousand square miles of forests, grasslands and mountains. Existing here is a daunting proposition, and some well-known animals have adapted by growing large or very small, each strategy maximizing their chance of survival.

programme.title: Wild Winter
programme.desc: This series examines the incredible adaptations, predatory behaviours, survival instincts, and breeding habits of the unique animals that call some of the iciest locations on Earth their home.

programme.title: Polar Worlds with Bertie Gregory Mashup
programme.desc: National Geographic filmmaker Bertie Gregory travels to the gateways to the poles to film wildlife in two of the harshest environments on the planet: South Georgia Island above Antarctica, and Canadas frigid North below the Arctic Circle. Surviving in these vastly different environments require cunning, persistence and the ability to adapt to a changing climate. This is the story of Berties quest to capture these wild environments firsthand.

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: South America is a land of extremes. Many hundred thousand square miles of forests, grasslands and mountains. Existing here is a daunting proposition, and some well-known animals have adapted by growing large or very small, each strategy maximizing their chance of survival.

programme.title: Strangest Nature
programme.desc: Evolution has created countless wondrous creatures that are colorful, amazing and strange. The darker side of nature reveals some of the most bizarre forms natural selection has produced. Gaze into the realm of gulpers: animals who waste no time eating their prey — often swallowing it whole. Something deadly lies silent in the leaf litter of West Africa. The Gaboon viper is loaded with the largest fangs and fastest strike of any snake. Further south, the solifuge, or sun spider, darts through the desert, seeking an unlucky bug to mince with its massive mandibles. Strange mouths are also in the ocean. The moray eel is a bizarre fish, but its most characteristic charm is hiding down its dark throat. These and more lie in store.

programme.title: Strangest Nature
programme.desc: Evolution has created countless wondrous creatures that are colorful, amazing and strange. The darker side of nature reveals some of the most bizarre forms natural selection has produced. Examine the weirdest animals that hide deep beneath the soils surface. A worm explodes from the seabed to yank fish into its mucky pit; a beetle tunnels deep into warm, wet dung; and a miniature digger excavates miles of tunnel with its teeth! Some hunt in swarms to overwhelm living prey, while solo operators rely on disguise and trickery to trap victims. Tunnellers display bizarre and ingenious solutions to survive in cramped, stuffy and dark conditions.

programme.title: Wild Winter
programme.desc: This series examines the incredible adaptations, predatory behaviours, survival instincts, and breeding habits of the unique animals that call some of the iciest locations on Earth their home.

programme.title: Wild Alaska
programme.desc: The rugged coast of our biggest state harbors the most incredible wildlife in America. This is the story of the creatures that endure this harsh reality along the shoreline Alaskas life on the edge.

programme.title: Snow School
programme.desc: When every day is a snow day, school is always in session! Snowy climates can make for harsh living, and adulting is hard no matter where you are, but these young are flourishing; a baby walrus gets a swim lesson from Mom, young stoats playtime teaches them how to hunt, otter pups take a slide and learn to avoid predators, and owlets practice leaving the nest. Well also see penguin chicks daring to take the leap, an unlikely team of mismatched teenagers, and others learning how to weather and thrive in the coldest climates, thanks to their snowy homeschooling, some very dedicated parents, and a lot of trial and error.

programme.title: Wild Lapland
programme.desc: A lyrical portrayal of the enchanting, wild creatures who call Lapland home.

programme.title: Polar Worlds with Bertie Gregory Mashup
programme.desc: National Geographic filmmaker Bertie Gregory travels to the gateways to the poles to film wildlife in two of the harshest environments on the planet: South Georgia Island above Antarctica, and Canadas frigid North below the Arctic Circle. Surviving in these vastly different environments require cunning, persistence and the ability to adapt to a changing climate. This is the story of Berties quest to capture these wild environments firsthand.

programme.title: Rare Cat Skills
programme.desc: Rare wild cats showcase extraordinary skills for survival. Over millennia, each species evolved with unique adaptations to suit their environment. The Pallass cat blends into Chinas rocky steppes, the black panther hunts in Indias forest shadows, and the snow leopard scales icy Himalayan peaks. Every camouflage trick, extraordinary skill and heightened sense are their keys to survival.

programme.title: Big Cat Planet
programme.desc: Big cats may seem like the ultimate wildlife cliche, but theyre locked in a global battle for survival. Powerful and dangerous, they now clash with humans more than ever. This sweeping safari reveals their resilience and adaptability. Cheetahs hunt from cars, jaguars stalk prey underwater and around boats, and Indias lions prowl city streets. Familiar species and behaviors take on new drama, with revelations that reaffirm why big cats remain natures most formidable predators.

programme.title: Polar Worlds with Bertie Gregory Mashup
programme.desc: National Geographic filmmaker Bertie Gregory travels to the gateways to the poles to film wildlife in two of the harshest environments on the planet: South Georgia Island above Antarctica, and Canadas frigid North below the Arctic Circle. Surviving in these vastly different environments require cunning, persistence and the ability to adapt to a changing climate. This is the story of Berties quest to capture these wild environments firsthand.

programme.title: Rare Cat Skills
programme.desc: Rare wild cats showcase extraordinary skills for survival. Over millennia, each species evolved with unique adaptations to suit their environment. The Pallass cat blends into Chinas rocky steppes, the black panther hunts in Indias forest shadows, and the snow leopard scales icy Himalayan peaks. Every camouflage trick, extraordinary skill and heightened sense are their keys to survival.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. This new series travels with him across rural Michigan to care for every family pet and head of livestock in need of his expertise and kindness.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol
programme.desc: With more than 19,000 patients, Dr. Pol has seen it all. Specializing in large farm animals, this senior is anything but retiring as he takes an old-school, non-nonsense approach to veterinary medicine. Unflappable and unstoppable, this doc routinely puts in 14-hour days and is a legend in his community. programme.title: Wild Alaska
programme.desc: The rugged coast of our biggest state harbors the most incredible wildlife in America. This is the story of the creatures that endure this harsh reality along the shoreline Alaskas life on the edge.

programme.title: Rare Cat Skills
programme.desc: Rare wild cats showcase extraordinary skills for survival. Over millennia, each species evolved with unique adaptations to suit their environment. The Pallass cat blends into Chinas rocky steppes, the black panther hunts in Indias forest shadows, and the snow leopard scales icy Himalayan peaks. Every camouflage trick, extraordinary skill and heightened sense are their keys to survival.

programme.title: Wild Winter
programme.desc: This series examines the incredible adaptations, predatory behaviours, survival instincts, and breeding habits of the unique animals that call some of the iciest locations on Earth their home.

programme.title: South Americas Weirdest Animals
programme.desc: South America is a land of extremes. Many hundred thousand square miles of forests, grasslands and mountains. Existing here is a daunting proposition, and some well-known animals have adapted by growing large or very small, each strategy maximizing their chance of survival.

programme.title: Strangest Nature
programme.desc: Evolution has created countless wondrous creatures that are colorful, amazing and strange. The darker side of nature reveals some of the most bizarre forms natural selection has produced. Gaze into the realm of gulpers: animals who waste no time eating their prey — often swallowing it whole. Something deadly lies silent in the leaf litter of West Africa. The Gaboon viper is loaded with the largest fangs and fastest strike of any snake. Further south, the solifuge, or sun spider, darts through the desert, seeking an unlucky bug to mince with its massive mandibles. Strange mouths are also in the ocean. The moray eel is a bizarre fish, but its most characteristic charm is hiding down its dark throat. These and more lie in store.

programme.title: Strangest Nature
programme.desc: Evolution has created countless wondrous creatures that are colorful, amazing and strange. The darker side of nature reveals some of the most bizarre forms natural selection has produced. Examine the weirdest animals that hide deep beneath the soils surface. A worm explodes from the seabed to yank fish into its mucky pit; a beetle tunnels deep into warm, wet dung; and a miniature digger excavates miles of tunnel with its teeth! Some hunt in swarms to overwhelm living prey, while solo operators rely on disguise and trickery to trap victims. Tunnellers display bizarre and ingenious solutions to survive in cramped, stuffy and dark conditions.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Ceļojumā uz Parīzi ģimene apskatīs lielisko Luvru. Diemžēl Barbalala neievēro strikto noteikumu - muzejā neēst. // Barbalala strikti ievēro ačgārnās dienas tradīcijas, kas cēlušās no seniem laikiem. Brāļi un māsas pievienojas viņai ačgārnajā dienā.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Vērojot zvaignzes Barbatētis un Lolita pamana lidojošo šķivīti un steidz pamodināt visu ģimeni. Izrādās, ka ciemos atlidojuši draugi, kuriem līdzi ir lielkājains mazulis, kurš pēkšņi uzradās viņu planētā. Ģimene ar kosmosa kuģi dodas mazuļa planētas meklējumos. // Barbatētis cer, ka viņi drīz atradīs mazuļa planētu. Bet ne viss iet pēc plāna un viņi nolaižas uz ļoti dīvainas planētas. Kā viņi tiks prom un vai atradīs mazuļa planētu?

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Bērniem ir garlaicīgi, jo ārā līst lietus. Bet vecāki zina, ka vajag tikai nedaudz iztēles, lai varētu izklaidēties aŗī lietū. Bērniem iztēle ir lieliska, varbūt pat pārāk... // Barbagudrais radīja dekoderi, kurš spēj iztulkot dzīvnieku skaņas, bet dzīvnieki fermā un pagalmā neko interesantu nesaka. Barbazū lūdz iztulkot okeāna iemītnieku valodu.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad Rabla iemīļotā beisbola zvaigzne netiek mājās, komanda uzbūvē stadionu, lai spēle notiktu turpat Celtnieklīcī. Kucēni gatavi sērfingam! Ja vien tiks pāri karstām smiltīm.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad Ātrmeistars uzbūvē atkritumu pārstrādes staciju pa savam, komandai jānovērš juceklis. Kad apmaldās pīlēns, Rabla komandai jārod risinājums, kā to vest mājās.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad ceļojošā veterinārārste daktere Diva nevar laikā veikt visu Celtnieklīcī dzīvojošo dzīvnieku apskati, Rabla komanda zina, kā jārīkojas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais uztvēris melodiju no Marsa. Barbapapas būvē raķeti, lai dotos uz sarkano planētu. Ceļā uz Marsu Barbapapas sastop Barbamarsiešu ģimeni. Viņiem nav laika iepazīties, kad ciemam uzbrūk milzu augs.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbamazuļi atrod ziloņu mazuli un slepeni par to rūpējas. Kā Barbatētis un Barbamamma reaģēs uz Borisu? Zilonis Boriss ilgojas pēc mājām. Barbapapas nolemj vest viņu atpakaļ uz Āfriku. Turpat viņi palīdz Borisam pielāgoties.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims izmēģina jaunus raķešzābakus, kas drīz kļūst nekontrolējami. Tims, Tomijs un Tija pieskata mēness papagaili. Tims, Tomijs un Tija sacenšas ar vecākiem astesbumbā.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Komanda uzbūvē staciju tieši laikā, lai sagaidītu fermeres Zojas jauno gotiņu. Uz Celtnieklīci pārvācas Sjerra Spīdošā. Taču, kad Rabla komanda taisās viņu sagaidīt, iejaucas Ātrmeistars.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad futbola laukumā sarodas trušu ģimene, Rabla komanda liek lietā prasmes un izdomā jaunu sportu - trušbolu!

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Arvien jauni piedzīvojumi ar Doru! Piebiedrojies drošajai pētniecei Dorai un viņas labākajam draugam Zābaciņam viņu brīnumainajos piedzīvojumos - no došanās palīgā dzīvniekiem kopā ar Djego līdz apburtas nāru pasaules glābšanai.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Autokinoteātrī tiek izrādīta jauna Supervāveres filma. Kad Ātrmeistars sarīko kārtējo jezgu, ķepaiņiem jārīkojas, lai glābtu situāciju. Ir Tanšu diena! Vai ķepaiņi paspēs uzbūvēt dāvanu tantei Celtnei?

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals – suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss – suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi – katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu, sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts – Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora un Zābaciņš satiek Garnadzi un viņa krustdēlu Foksiju. Viņiem jānokļūst mājās, pirms Garnadzis un Foksijs pagūst nočiept spēļu lācīti. Dora satiek Zābaciņa māsīcu Cepurīti, un viņi dodas lietusmežā, lai meklētu īpašos zilos banānus.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Omīte uzadīja Timam cepuri, taču tā nemitīgi traucē.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Reksu ģimene dodas ceļojumā cauri galaktikai, lai nokļūtu Raķešpasaulē.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims un Kaja cīnās par Terijas rezerves biļeti uz Kosmoslendu.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Ķīmiskas villas padara lauku apvidu rožainu. Barbapapas uzbūvē putnu māju, lai pasargātu sasirgušos putnus. Ieraugot piesārņotu pludmali, Barbapapu ģimene izlemj to uzkopt. No drazām top mini golfa laukums.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbapapa un Lolita ceļo gaisa balonā, bet vētra viņus aiznes uz vientuļu salu.

programme.title: Krokodila kungs
programme.desc: Krokodilkungs grib būt labs viesis Deizijas dzimšanas dienas ballītē, tā kā tādā vēl nekad nav bijis. Steigdamies paspēt uz koncertu, Krokodilkungs un Deizija mammas iepakošanas un nosūtīšanas veikalā pazaudē biļetes.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Trenere Karima lūdz uzbūvēt zāli vingrošanas šovam. Izrādās, ka Lilijai baļķis ir par augstu. Jādomā risinājums! Kad ceļojošais šovs netiek līdz Celtnieklīcim, kucēni rīko paši savu šovu.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Pirms sākas vētra un sarežģījumi ar cālēniem, kucēni fermerei Zojai steidz būvēt lietus ūdens savācēju.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals – suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss – suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi – katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu, sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts – Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Daži dzīvnieki ir biedējoši un šķiet bīstami. Tētis stāsta savu piedzīvojumu, kad viņš ar Lolitu kāpa kalnos un satika vilku. // Rīt ir bērnu pirmā skolas diena, katrs gatavojas citādāk. Pirmā skolas diena ir satraucoša, tik daudz par ko jāpadomā.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbatētis un Barbamamma paziņo bērniem, ka divatā dosies atpūsties uz Lieldienu salu.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims nolemj pierādīt, ka Kajas tētis ir kapteinis Dinostārs. Tims cenšas atpūsties, bet Tijai ir citi plāni. Tims nopērk labākos cepumus pilsētā, bet drīz saprot, ka citiem tos vajag vairāk nekā viņam.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Jauni piedzīvojumi ar DORU! Pievienojies drošajai pasaules pētītājai Dorai un viņas labākajam draugam Zābaciņam viņu kopīgajos ceļojumos pa maģisko lietusmežu, kurā var notikt - un notiek - brīnumu lietas. Lets go!

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Arvien jauni piedzīvojumi ar Doru! Piebiedrojies drošajai pētniecei Dorai un viņas labākajam draugam Zābaciņam viņu brīnumainajos piedzīvojumos - no došanās palīgā dzīvniekiem kopā ar Djego līdz apburtas nāru pasaules glābšanai.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Krokodila kungs
programme.desc: Savā pirmajā Halovīnā Krokodilkungs pārģērbjas par Superkrokodilu un cenšas attaisnot savu jauno identitāti. Deizija un Krokodilkungs apsola Floresas kundzei rūpēties par viņas dārgo augu, bet visu laiku atliek to uz vēlāku.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Kamēr ģimene veido keramikas izstrādājumus, Barbabravo un Barbagudrais mēģina uzstādīt pasaules rekordu ar siera suflē. Barbapapas nolemj doties uz parku. Kamēr brālis un māsa spēlējas, Barbaliba mēģina visu kontrolēt.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs, Tija un tētis netiek prom attāla asteroīda. Tims, Kaja un Tomijs cenšas dabūt laukā bumbu no mammas istabas. Tims cenšas dabūt lejā Tijas jauno balonu, kas ieķēries kokā.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabls ar komandu strādā pie tā, lai izglābtu Čārdžera dzimšanas dienas ballīti!

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora un Zābaciņš palīdz rumpuļiem pagatavot troļļa džemu, pirms Īgnais Trollis pārrodas, lai našķētos. Dorai un Zābaciņam jāatrod un jānoliek vietā burvju kaķītis, kurš visiem draugiem liek uzvesties kā kaķiem!

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais pastāsta pārējiem, cik vareni bija Da Vinči izgudrojumi un nu katrs grib izgudrot ko savu. Ģēniju ir maz, bet ir jautri izgudrot. // Bērniem jāizvēlas - doties baseinā vai izbraukt ar riteņiem. Uzreiz izveidojas divas frontes un tikai Barbazū spēj nosvērt izvēles svarus.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Tētis paskaidro Barbabravo un Barbalalai, ka viņi var spēlēties, kā vēlas, bet bērni nesaprot, ka tētis neļāva viņiem kļūt par maziem dumpiniekiem. // Kas ir Barbapapas? Viņi ir dažādās krāsās, spēj transformēties, daži ir spalvaini. Atbildi var atras tikai Barbazinātne.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbalala rīko lielo talantu konkursu. Katram barbabērnam uz skatuves jādemonstrē savs lielākais talants, nekādas nīkuļošanas! // Videospēles ir jautras, bet jāmāk izbaudīt jauki laikapstākļi. Vecāki izlemj bērniem radīt jautras rotaļas ārā. Bet lomas un mīklas jādala uzmanīgi, lai nerodas pārsteīgumi.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Mērei Greitvejai vajag daudz picas, un ātri! Bet, kad pieslēdzas Ātrmeistars, suņiem jānovērš viņa picas problēma. Kad ģimene pa Ātrmeistara ceļu nevar pagūt uz lidostu, Rabla komandai līdz izlidošanai jāuzbūvē jauns ceļš.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Mēre Greitveja un Dakija Dū kungs vēlas nodemonstrēt savas izpletņlēkšanas prasmes. Taču, kad patraucē vējš, suņi palīdz viņiem lēkt ar izpletni uz zemes! Kad Vīleram un cūkai Trifelei nesanāk slidot, komanda rod risinājumu uz riteņiem!

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Lilijas nāriņu ballīte tiek atsaukta, kad sāk līt. Laiks celtniecības risinājumam!

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Kamēr ģimene veido keramikas izstrādājumus, Barbabravo un Barbagudrais mēģina uzstādīt pasaules rekordu ar siera suflē. Barbapapas nolemj doties uz parku. Kamēr brālis un māsa spēlējas, Barbaliba mēģina visu kontrolēt.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs un Tija atrod pazudušu rotaļlietu un sola atgriezt to saimniekam. Kaja gaida, kad brauks ar Nebulatoru, bet Tims nav drošs. Tims un Kaja cenšas nofotografēt maldinošu Kosmosa vaboli.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kucēnu iemīļotajām grāmatām iznācis turpinājums! Tām nav vietas bibliotēkā, tāpēc kucēniem jābūt radošiem! Kucēni Rablam gatavo pārsteigumu - uzkodu mašīnu, bet vai Rabls neko nenojautīs?

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kucēni uzbūvē frizētavu, lai sapostu vectēvu Grantu, taču gadās misēklis. Motore un Lilija veic spīdošu atklājumu, kas jānosvin ar krāšņāko šovu!

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Arvien jauni piedzīvojumi ar Doru! Piebiedrojies drošajai pētniecei Dorai un viņas labākajam draugam Zābaciņam viņu brīnumainajos piedzīvojumos - no došanās palīgā dzīvniekiem kopā ar Djego līdz apburtas nāru pasaules glābšanai.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Sekojot iemīļotā detektīva pēdās, Barbabravo meklē noziegumu, kas jāatklāj. Vai viņš spēs atklāt noslēpumaino ledus skulptūras pazušanu? Barbabērni gatavo savu mīļāko varoņu iedvesmotus tērpus, taču varoņi neeksistē bez ļaundariem...

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērni laimē skārienpaliktni. Visi grab to izmantot, tāpēc čiepj viens pēc otra. Barbazū krāj ūsainu slavenību bildes. Diemžēl nekur nevar atrast pēdējo: Čārlzu Pakavu-Ūsaini. Viņam ir aizdomas par sazvērestību...

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tomijs piedalās raķešu sacīkstēs, Tims atbalsta savu brāli. Tims novērš Tijas domas no Taskija, kamēr tas mazgājas veļas mašīnā. Bērni kļūst par vecākiem, un vecāki - par bērniem.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Rabla komanda palīdz Riveram uzņemt daudz fotogrāfiju foto konkursam, uzbūvējot ļoti ātru veidu, kā pārvietoties pa Celtnieklīci. Rabls un ķepaiņi palīdz Karlam pagatavot saldējumu visiem. Ja vien Ātrmeistars viņiem netraucēs...

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals – suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss – suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi – katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu, sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts – Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Vecmamma rāda Dorai fotoalbumu ar putnu bildēm. Tomēr albumā vēl trūkst Fiksadū fotogrāfijas. Dora apņemas atrast un nofotografēt ašo putnu. Dora un Zābaciņš palīdz papagailēnam atgriezties mājās - taču ceļā putnēns nebeidz mēdīties!

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tija un Tomijs rīko talantu šovu, bet nevar izlemt, kurš uzstāsies pirmais.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Tomijs, Tija un tētis netiek prom attāla asteroīda.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims, Kaja un Tomijs cenšas dabūt laukā bumbu no mammas istabas.

programme.title: Cūciņa Pepa
programme.desc: Cūciņa Pepa ir mīļa, ziņkārīga un aktīva pirmskolniece, kura kopā ar māmiņu, tēti un brālīti Džordžu ik dienu uzzina daudz ko jaunu un aizraujošu. Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbatētis un Barbamamma paziņo bērniem, ka divatā dosies atpūsties uz Lieldienu salu. Barbabērni, dvīņi un Stingrā kungs dodas izbraucienā ar jahtu.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais rada putekļu sūkšanas robotu, kas lieliski spēlē futbolu. Barbabērni sarīko spēli pret robotiem.

programme.title: Krokodila kungs
programme.desc: Krokodilkungs baidās, ka tiks spiests izvēlēties starp senu labāko draugu Bazziju un jaunu labāko draudzeni Deiziju. Deizijas un Krokodilkunga vienkāršā mājiņa kokā tiek sarežģīta, kad viņi cenšas to paplašināt draugu dēļ.

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Karls atver smūtiju kafejnīcu. Kad sākas kokosriekstu haoss, palīgā steidz Rabla komanda. Rabls ar komandu strādā pie tā, lai izglābtu Čārdžera dzimšanas dienas ballīti!

programme.title: Rabla komanda
programme.desc: Kad juceklis uz dabas takas apmulsina visus Dakija Dū kunga dzimšanas dienas ballītes viesus, ķepaiņi viņiem palīdz atrast ceļu.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbagudrais uztvēris melodiju no Marsa. Barbapapas būvē raķeti, lai dotos uz sarkano planētu. Ceļā uz Marsu Barbapapas sastop Barbamarsiešu ģimeni. Viņiem nav laika iepazīties, kad ciemam uzbrūk milzu augs.

programme.title: Barbapapas - Lielā ģimene!
programme.desc: Barbabērni, dvīņi un Stingrā kungs dodas izbraucienā ar jahtu.

programme.title: Tims Rekss kosmosā
programme.desc: Tims un Kaja meklē pludmalē apraktos niekus. Tims atbrīvojas no vecajām lietām, bet drīz saprot, ka ne visam vieta miskastē. Tims, Tija un Tomijs cenšas pārliecināt mammu un tēti par labu mīlulim.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora palīdz pelēnam Peresam salabot burvju zobu suku, lai varētu saņemt dāvanu par savu izkritušo zobu. Dora iepazīstas ar kāpuru Karlosu, kurš vēlas kļūt pr tauriņu! Lai tas notiktu, draugiem viņam jāatrod sviestogu cienasts.

Pepas iecienītākās nodarbes ir rotaļāšanās, pārģērbšanās un lēkāšana pa dubļainām peļķēm, un viņas jautrie piedzīvojumi vienmēr beidzas ar skaļiem smieklu rukšķiem.

programme.title: Bleizs un automonstri
programme.desc: Bleizs un automonstri ir interaktīvs seriāls datorgrafikā par Bleizu, lieliskāko automonstru pasaulē, tā vadītāju astoņgadīgu zēnu vārdā Eidžejs un viņu piedzīvojumiem Asupilī. Asupilī nav lielākas zvaigznes par Bleizu. Viņš ir čempions sacīkšu trasē un varonis ārpus tās. Kad vien ir kāda ķibele, visi vēršas pie viņa, jo zina, ka Bleizs spēj to, ko nespēj citas mašīnas. Viņš ir ātrākais automonstrs pilsētā - viņam piemīt bliezienātrums! Liekot lietā savas zināšanas, Bleizs spēj tikt galā ar jebkādu izaicinājumu. Ja situācija kļūst sarežģīta, viņš spēj iztēloties sevi par jebkuru mašīnu, pārvērsties par to un pavisam viegli atrisināt ikvienu problēmu.

programme.title: Ķepu patruļa
programme.desc: "Ķepu patruļa" ir seriāls pirmsskolas vecuma bērniem, kura galvenie varoņi ir seši varonīgi kucēni Čeiss, Māršals, Rokijs, Zuma, Rabls un Skaja, kuru saimnieks ir tehnoloģijas pārzinošais 10 gadus vecais zēns Raiders. Viņiem ir unikālas problēmu risināšanas spējas, stilīgi braucamrīki un daudz kucēniem raksturīga mīļa humora. "Kepu patruļa" dodas bīstamās glābšanas misijās, lai Piedzīvojumu līča iedzīvotāji būtu drošībā. Māršals – suns ugunsdzējs, Čeiss – suns policists, Skaja, kura lido savā helikopterā, un citi – katram kucēnam ir sava īpaša personība un spējas, atspoguļojot kopīga darba un pilsoniskās atbildības nozīmību. Viņiem visiem uz muguras ir īpašas mugursomas, lai viņi būtu spējīgi paveikt visu, sākot no kaķēnu glābšanas līdz vilciena apturēšanai, neļaujot tam nokrist no klints. Lai cik liels būtu piedzīvojums, "Ķepu patruļai" vienmēr atliek laiks spēlēm, jautrībai un tam, lai Raiders pakasa aiz auss. Interesants "Ķepu patruļas" fakts – Raders izglāba visus kucēnus un iemācīja tiem viņu spējas.
